title: Unnale Lyrics Darling Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Unnale Kangal Thallaadi Lyrics From Darling Tamil Movie
Singer(s): Shankar Mahadevan, Shreya Ghosal

Unnaale
kangal thallaadi
urangaamal
yaengum en aavi.

Neeraaviyaai
ennai nee modhinaai.
Un paarvayil
eeram unndaakkinaai.

Nee thoda thoda
naanum poovaai malarndhaen.
Naan en penmayil
vaasam unarndhaen.

Nee arugil vara vara
aaval arindhaen.
Naan en aanmayil
paavam thurandhaen.

Munjenmam ellaam
poi endru ninaithaen.
un kannai
paarthaen meithaanada.

uruvangal ellaam
udal vittu pogum.
ullathil kadhal saagaadhadi.

Unnaale
kangal thallaadi
urangaamal
yaengum en aavi.

Yedho ondrai
unnil kandaen.
Eriyum theeyai
ennai kandaen.

Uyirin uyiraai
unnai kandaen.
ennai alli
un kayyil thandhaen.

Kadhal kondu kangal kenja
adi kai meeri uyirodudhey.

Unnaale
kangal thallaadi
urangaamal
yaengum en aavi.

Muludhaai nilavu
nammai paarkka.
kattril engum
adhu maayam serkka.

Kaigal korththu serthu
nee vetkam serkka.
Vetkam thaandi
naan ennai thorkka.

Maranam thaandi
vazhum kadhal.
un vhzhiyoram
naan kaangiren.

Unnaale
kangal thallaadi
urangaamal
yaengum en aavi.

Neeraaviyaai
ennai nee modhinaai.
Un paarvayil
eeram unndaakkinaai.

Nee thoda thoda
naanum poovaai malarndhaen.
Naan en penmayil
vaasam unarndhaen.

Nee arugil vara vara
aaval arindhaen.
Naan en aanmayil
paavam thurandhaen.

Munjenmam ellaam
poi endru ninaithaen.
un kannai
paarthaen meithaanada.

uruvangal ellaam
udal vittu pogum.
ullathil kadhal saagaadhadi.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Unnale'?

The song 'Unnale' expresses deep emotions of love and longing, highlighting the beauty of romantic connections.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Darling'?

In the movie 'Darling', the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' relationship.

Who are the singers of 'Unnale'?

The song features the talented voices of Shankar Mahadevan and Shreya Ghoshal.

Who composed the music for 'Unnale'?

The music for 'Unnale' was composed by GV PrakashKumar, known for his melodious tunes.

When was 'Unnale' released?

'Unnale' was released on November 28, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Unnale' from the movie Darling is a romantic duet that encapsulates the essence of love and connection. Sung by the talented Shankar Mahadevan and Shreya Ghoshal, it features a melodious composition by GV PrakashKumar that resonates with heartfelt emotions. The lyrics convey a sense of longing and affection, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions. This enchanting track beautifully enhances the narrative of the film, leaving listeners with a warm feeling of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unnale from Darling is a captivating romantic duet that beautifully showcases the enchanting voices of Shankar Mahadevan and Shreya Ghoshal. The song's melodious composition by GV PrakashKumar perfectly complements the heartfelt lyrics, creating an unforgettable listening experience. Dive into this musical gem that captures the essence of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: My eyes are restless without you, everywhere my soul wanders.
You are my life, you have made me yours. Your gaze creates a magic.
I have blossomed like a flower because of you. I have felt your presence in my heart.
I have known that you are coming closer. I have opened my heart to you.
I thought everything would be a lie. I looked into your eyes and saw the truth.
All forms will leave the body. Love will not fade from the heart.
My eyes are restless without you, everywhere my soul wanders.
I found something in you. I found the fire that burns.
I found my life in you. You have given me a purpose.
Love has made my eyes shed tears, and I am alive because of you.
My eyes are restless without you, everywhere my soul wanders.
The moon looks at us from everywhere. In the wind, it creates magic.
With our hands joined together, you create a sense of comfort. I push away my worries.
Love transcends death. I see your life in my dreams.
My eyes are restless without you, everywhere my soul wanders.
You are my life, you have made me yours. Your gaze creates a magic.
I have blossomed like a flower because of you. I have felt your presence in my heart.
I have known that you are coming closer. I have opened my heart to you.
I thought everything would be a lie. I looked into your eyes and saw the truth.
All forms will leave the body. Love will not fade from the heart.
